series_metadata.series_title: Board Member Contunuing Professional Development Files
series_metadata.series_description: Includes retreat information, federation activities, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Scan to electronic medium for storage, check scan for accuracy, then destroy. Retain existing offsite files for 75 years, unless needed for longer period of time based upon legal or administrative significance or scanned to electronic medium for storage. ; Electronic: Retain for ten years after Board member separates from the Board., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
